home.title: Belgian Bridge Competition
home.forbidden: You do not have access to that page. Ask a competition administrator if you need a role assigned.
home.tagline: Core league flow MVP — authentication and public standings are live.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: We will email you a magic link — no password required.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the magic link.

standings.title: Standings
standings.noLeagues: No leagues in the active season yet.
standings.noDivisions: No divisions in this league yet.

table.noTeamsInGroup: No teams in this group yet.
table.roundColumnsPending: Round columns appear after the match schedule is generated.

penalties.title: Penalties
penalties.description: VP deductions applied to teams in this group.

rulings.title: Rulings
rulings.description: Official arbiter rulings for matches in this group.

match.title: Round {round}: {homeTeam} vs {awayTeam}
match.signInPrompt: <link>Sign in</link> to score this match or manage lineups if you are on one of the teams.

reschedule.title: Reschedule match
reschedule.description: Propose a new date on this page. The other captain or a competition manager can approve or reject a pending request here.
reschedule.playedNoLonger: This match has been played; rescheduling is no longer available.
reschedule.pendingBody: {proposingTeam} proposed {proposedDatetime}. Official date remains {currentDatetime} until approved.
reschedule.chooseTeamAndDate: Choose a team and new date/time
reschedule.proposedSuccess: Reschedule proposed. Both captains and competition managers were notified by email. The other captain or a competition manager can approve here on this match page.

homeAwaySwitch.title: Home/away switch
homeAwaySwitch.description: Captains can request switching which team is marked as host for this match. The other captain or a competition manager must approve.
homeAwaySwitch.firstLegLine: Round {firstLegRound} (first leg): {firstLegHome} (home) vs {firstLegAway} (away). This match (round {round}): {currentHome} (home) vs {currentAway} (away).
homeAwaySwitch.onlyCaptain: Only the home or away team captain can propose a swap. Pending requests can be approved by the opposing captain or a competition manager on this page.
homeAwaySwitch.pendingBody: {requestingTeam} proposed swapping home and away. The match still lists {homeTeam} (home) vs {awayTeam} (away) until approved.
homeAwaySwitch.needsSwitchHint: This match still lists the same home team as round {firstLegRound}. Propose a swap so the other team hosts, as in the standard return leg.
homeAwaySwitch.alreadySwappedHint: The listing already follows return-leg rules (home and away are swapped compared with round {firstLegRound}). Propose only if that is wrong or you agreed with the other captain to switch venues.
homeAwaySwitch.proposedSuccess: Home/away switch proposed. The other captain or a competition manager can approve or reject on this match page.
homeAwaySwitch.approved: Host switched to the other team for this match.
homeAwaySwitch.blocked: A postponement may be pending, or this match cannot accept a new request right now.

arbiterRequest.title: Arbiter request
arbiterRequest.hint: Upload a photo or PDF (max 10 MB), then submit to the arbiter.
arbiterRequest.uploadedReady: Attachment uploaded. You can submit the request.
arbiterRequest.submittedSuccess: Arbiter request submitted. Arbiters, both captains, and competition managers were notified by email.

lineup.selectAtLeast4: Select at least 4 players from your roster.
lineup.substitutesHint: Add substitutes from your club (not on the team roster).

addSub.title: Add substitute
addSub.hint: Choose a club member who is not on the team roster.

score.title: Score
score.notPlayedYet: This match has not been played yet.
score.lineupsFirst: Save both team lineups above first (at least 4 players per team).
score.misSeating: Mis-seating — only 3/4 of the boards played
score.vpScaleMisSeating: Mis-seating: VP calculated for {effective} boards (3/4 of {scheduled})
score.lockedContact: Score is locked. Contact an arbiter or competition manager to change it.

penalty.title: Add penalty VP
penalty.description: Deduct VP from a team with a written motivation. Document optional.
penalty.vpNonNegative: VP deduction must be zero or positive

players.appearancesDescription: Teams this player appeared for in played matches this season.

player.title: Player
player.notLinked: Your account is not linked to a player profile yet. Ask a competition administrator to link your user to your player record.
player.noMatches: No matches ready to score. Check back when a scheduled match is assigned to you.

team.noPlayers: No players on the roster yet.
team.matchesPlayed: {count, plural, =0 {0 matches} one {# match} other {# matches}}
team.rosterLocked: Roster changes are locked while the season is active.
team.rosterEditable: Add unassigned club members to this team.
team.noUnassigned: No unassigned club members available to add.

conventionCards.title: Convention cards
conventionCards.description: System summaries shared with opponents (PDF or image).
conventionCards.name: Name
conventionCards.deleteConfirm: Delete convention card "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

arbiter.pageDescription: Open requests from team captains. Mark resolved when handled.
arbiter.rulingFileHint: Official ruling (PDF or image, required, max 10 MB)
arbiter.rulingUploaded: Ruling uploaded. You can resolve the request.
arbiter.uploadRulingFirst: Upload an official ruling document before resolving.
arbiter.scoreRequiresPlayed: Score adjustment requires an official match score.
arbiter.scoreFieldsIncomplete: Complete all score fields before resolving.
arbiter.penaltyFieldsIncomplete: Complete team, date, VP deduction, and reason for the penalty.
arbiter.warningFieldsIncomplete: Complete team, date, and reason for the warning.

score.vpScaleMisSeating: VP scale: {scheduled} boards scheduled, {effective} for VP (mis-seating)

admin.title: Admin
admin.competitionSetupDescription: Match days, divisions, teams, and starting the league.
admin.disciplineHubDescription: Penalties, warnings, and official rulings per group.
admin.auditLogHubDescription: Match change history and operational actions per group.

rosterLock.title: Team rosters
rosterLock.lockedDescription: Rosters are locked. Teams, schedule slots, and player assignments cannot be changed until you unlock.
rosterLock.unlockedDescription: Rosters are open. Lock when team compositions are final — after that, no more roster or team assignment changes.
rosterLock.lockConfirm: Lock all team rosters for this competition? Team and roster changes will be blocked until you unlock.
rosterLock.unlockConfirm: Unlock rosters so teams and player assignments can be edited again?

admin.seasonActivated: Season activated — rosters and memberships are now locked.

nationalTabs.matchDaysIntro: Set match days for each calendar (Europe/Brussels). Start times are fixed per division level.
nationalTabs.structureFailed: Failed to set up national structure

regionalTabs.matchDaysIntro: Set the 14 shared regional match days (Europe/Brussels). All groups use this calendar; matches start at 14:00.
regionalTabs.structureIntro: Create divisions and groups for this regional league. You can add or remove groups before assigning teams.
regionalTabs.structureFailed: Failed to set up regional league

regionalStructure.title: Divisions & groups
regionalStructure.description: Define how the regional league is split into divisions and playing groups.
regionalStructure.noLeagueYet: Regional league is still being set up.
regionalStructure.noDivisions: No divisions yet — add your first division below.
regionalStructure.confirmRemoveGroup: Remove group "{name}"? Teams in this group will also be removed.

regionalTeams.title: Teams
regionalTeams.description: Select a group, then add teams, schedule slots, and round settings.
regionalTeams.noLeagueYet: Regional league is still being set up.
regionalTeams.noGroups: No groups yet — create divisions and groups in the Structure tab first.

regionalStartLeague.statusBody: The season is {status}. Divisions, groups, and teams are locked; you can still change captains. Lock rosters below when compositions are final.
regionalStartLeague.title: Start league
regionalStartLeague.description: When match days and all groups are ready, generate fixtures for every group and activate this regional league. The whole season becomes active (national setup will lock if not finished yet).
regionalStartLeague.fixturesPartial: Fixtures partially generated — remaining groups still need schedules
regionalStartLeague.resumeHint: Some groups already have fixtures; click to generate the rest and activate
regionalStartLeague.confirmWithFixtures: Activate the regional league? Fixtures are already generated; rosters will be locked.
regionalStartLeague.confirmGenerate: Generate fixtures for all groups and start the league? Rosters will be locked after this.
regionalStartLeague.started: League started. Fixtures generated and season is now active.

regionalBlockers.seasonNotSetup: Season is no longer in setup.
regionalBlockers.leagueMissing: Regional league is not set up yet.
regionalBlockers.noGroups: Add at least one division and group with teams.

matchDates.title: Match dates ({roundCount} rounds)
matchDates.pickDatesOnly: Pick dates only (Europe/Brussels). Matches start at {slotTime}.

nationalMatchDays.title: Match days ({count})
nationalMatchDays.pickDays: Pick match days only (Europe/Brussels). Start times are fixed: {slotTimes}.

nationalTeams.title: Teams
nationalTeams.description: Select a division, then add 7 or 8 teams (one per club). If you have 7 teams, add a bye in the schedule slot order below. Each team needs a captain from that club.
nationalTeams.noGroupYet: This division has no group yet. National structure may still be setting up.

nationalDiscipline.needTeams: Add teams to national divisions before managing penalties, warnings, and rulings.

disciplinePage.title: Discipline
disciplinePage.description: Manage penalties, warnings, and rulings for the selected group.
disciplinePage.noGroups: No groups available yet. Set up divisions and teams in

auditLogPage.title: Audit log
auditLogPage.description: View match change history for the selected group.

startLeague.statusBody: The season is {status}. Divisions, groups, and teams are locked; you can still change captains. Lock rosters below when compositions are final.
startLeague.title: Start league
startLeague.description: When match days and teams are complete, generate all fixtures and activate the season.
startLeague.confirmWithFixtures: Activate the national league? Fixtures are already generated; rosters will be locked.
startLeague.confirmGenerate: Generate fixtures for all 8 divisions and start the league? Rosters will be locked after this.
startLeague.started: League started. Fixtures generated and season is now active.

teamsPanel.dragHint: Drag teams to set spots 1–8 for schedule generation.
teamsPanel.dragHintBye: Add a bye and place it in one of the eight spots.
teamsPanel.assignSlotsWarning: Assign all teams{byePart} to spots 1–8 before generating the schedule.
teamsPanel.noClubs: No clubs found. Create clubs before adding teams.
teamsPanel.addPlayersFirst: Add players to this club before creating a team.

scheduleSettings.title: Schedule settings
scheduleSettings.rbbfTemplate: {teamCount} teams · 14-round RBBF template (all regional dates used)
scheduleSettings.byeHint: Use the schedule slot order above to place a bye. Teams paired against the bye receive 12 VP after the match date.
scheduleSettings.roundsSummary: {teamCount} teams · {perCycle} rounds per cycle · total {total} fixture rounds
scheduleSettings.oddGroupRest: Odd group size: one team rests each round and receives 12 VP after the match date (via automation).
scheduleSettings.cyclesRangeError: Round-robin count must be between 1 and {max} ({calendarRounds} match dates, {perCycle} rounds per cycle).
scheduleSettings.regionalDatesHint: Choose {count} of the 14 shared regional dates for this group. Dates are configured in the regional calendar above.
scheduleSettings.selectMoreDates: Select {count, plural, one {# more date} other {# more dates}}
scheduleSettings.selectExactDates: Select exactly {count} dates from the regional calendar.

penalties.selectGroup: Select a group above to manage VP penalties (standings corrections).
penalties.title: Penalties & corrections
penalties.description: VP deductions apply to group standings for the active season.

warnings.selectGroup: Select a group above to manage team warnings.
warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Formal warnings issued to teams (visible on standings context).

rulings.selectGroup: Select a group above to manage match rulings.
rulings.title: Rulings
rulings.description: Official rulings per match (PDF or image, max 10 MB). Board optional.
rulings.matchFileRequired: Match and PDF/image file are required
rulings.deleteConfirm: Delete this ruling and its file?

auditLog.selectGroup: Select a group above to browse match audit logs.
auditLog.title: Match audit log
auditLog.description: Recent actions on matches in this group ({total} total).

nationalBlockers.seasonNotSetup: Season is no longer in setup.
nationalBlockers.structureIncomplete: National structure is incomplete (need 8 divisions with groups).

arbiterRequestCreated.subject: Arbiter request: {matchLine}
arbiterRequestCreated.bodyIntro: A team captain submitted an arbiter request with an attachment.

arbiterRequestResolved.subject: Arbiter request resolved: {matchLine}
arbiterRequestResolved.bodyIntro: An arbiter request has been resolved with an official ruling.

postponementProposed.subject: Reschedule request: {homeTeam} vs {awayTeam} (round {round})
postponementProposed.bodyIntro: {proposingTeam} proposed a new date for this match.
postponementProposed.openToApprove: Open the match to approve or reject:
postponementProposed.openMatchLink: Open match to approve or reject

homeAwaySwitchProposed.subject: Home/away switch request: {homeTeam} vs {awayTeam} (round {round})
homeAwaySwitchProposed.bodyProposed: {requestingTeam} proposed switching the host side for this match.

api.boardPositiveInteger: board must be a positive integer when provided
api.boardPositive: board must be positive when provided
api.matchNotActiveSeason: Match is not in the active season
api.impsMustBeNumbers: imps_home and imps_away must be numbers
api.noOfficialScoreUsePost: Match has no official score yet; use POST to submit
api.vpDeductionNonNegative: vp_deduction must be a non-negative number
api.purposeInvalid: purpose must be ruling, arbiter_request, or penalty
api.teamIdRequiredPenalty: teamId is required for penalty uploads
api.cannotDeleteTeamWithMatches: Cannot delete team with scheduled matches
api.playerNotClubMember: Player is not a member of this club
api.homeAwayNotAvailable: Home/away switch is not available for this match
api.teamWarningFieldsRequired: team_id, warning_date, and reason are required
api.teamNotActiveSeason: Team is not in the active season
api.conventionUpdateRequired: Provide name and/or file to update
api.leagueNameMustBe: League name must be "{expectedName}" for this scope
api.playerIdRequiredNoCreate: player_id is required; club managers cannot create new players
api.teamAndPlayersRequired: team_id and players array are required
api.teamIdHomeOrAway: team_id must be home or away for this match
api.penaltyFieldsRequired: team_id, penalty_date, and reason are required
api.captainNotClubMember: Captain must be a member of the team's club
api.captainAlreadyOnAnotherTeam: Captain is already on another team this season; remove them from that roster first
api.captainIdInvalid: captain_id must be a valid player id
api.seasonSetupLocked: Season is active; setup changes are locked
api.rostersLocked: Team rosters are locked for this competition

auth.cannotEditLineupAfterPlayed: Cannot edit lineup after match is played
auth.cannotEditLineup: Forbidden: cannot edit lineup for this match
auth.matchAlreadyScored: Match already scored; use admin edit
auth.cannotSubmitScore: Forbidden: cannot submit score for this match
auth.onlyArbiterOrManagerEditScore: Forbidden: only arbiters or competition managers can edit official scores
auth.notAssignedClub: Forbidden: not assigned to this club
auth.cannotManageConventionCards: Forbidden: cannot manage convention cards for this team

scheduleSlots.onlySevenOrEight: Schedule slots apply only to groups with 7 or 8 teams
scheduleSlots.byeCannotHaveTeam: Bye slot cannot have a team
scheduleSlots.teamNotInGroup: Team does not belong to this group
scheduleSlots.teamOneSlot: Each team can only occupy one slot
scheduleSlots.onlyOneBye: Only one bye slot is allowed
scheduleSlots.eightTeamsNoBye: Groups with 8 teams cannot have a bye slot
scheduleSlots.sevenTeamsOneBye: Groups with 7 teams require exactly one bye slot
scheduleSlots.sevenTeamsAllAssigned: All 7 teams must be assigned to slots
scheduleSlots.eightTeamsAllAssigned: All 8 teams must be assigned to slots
scheduleSlots.cannotChangeAfterFixtures: Cannot change schedule slots after fixtures are generated

files.tooLarge: File must be 10 MB or smaller
files.invalidType: File must be a PDF or image (JPEG, PNG, WebP)

nationalMatchDays.missingDate: Match day {round} is missing a date
